Meanwhile at NODZ: non-custodial staking only.

You keep your keys, you keep your coins, you keep your sleep at night.

Stay safe out there.

thanks to @iEx_ec @OasisProtocol @FlareNetworks for the amazing evening.

Cheers🍻
